recommendations.title: Vanishing Time: A Boy Who Returned
recommendations.overview: Days after her friends disappear during a trip to a mysterious cave, a girl is approached by a grown man claiming to be one of her missing pals.

recommendations.title: Along with the Gods: The Two Worlds
recommendations.overview: Having died unexpectedly, firefighter Ja-hong is taken to the afterlife by 3 afterlife guardians. Only when he passes 7 trials over 49 days and proves he was innocent in human life, he’s able to reincarnate, and his 3 afterlife guardians are by his s

recommendations.title: Along with the Gods: The Last 49 Days
recommendations.overview: As the deceased soul Ja-hong and his three afterlife guardians prepare for their remaining trials for reincarnation, the guardians soon come face to face with the truth of their tragic time on Earth 1,000 years earlier.

recommendations.title: Infested
recommendations.overview: Residents of a rundown French apartment building battle against an army of deadly, rapidly reproducing spiders.

recommendations.title: The Moon
recommendations.overview: In 2029, Korea's lunar probe Woori embarks on a historic journey to the moon, capturing global attention.

recommendations.title: 200 Pounds Beauty
recommendations.overview: Hanna, an overweight lip-sync artist who ghost sings for Ammy, a known pop diva, secretly likes Han Sang-jun. When Ammy humiliates Hanna in Han's presence, Hanna decides to undergo a cosmetic surgery.

recommendations.title: Badland Hunters
recommendations.overview: After a deadly earthquake turns Seoul into a lawless badland, a fearless huntsman springs into action to rescue a teenager abducted by a mad doctor.

recommendations.title: The Quake
recommendations.overview: A geologist races against time to save his estranged wife and two children when a devastating earthquake strikes Oslo, Norway.

recommendations.title: Woman in the Dunes
recommendations.overview: A vacationing entomologist suffers extreme physical and psychological trauma after being taken captive by the residents of a poor seaside village and made to live with a woman whose life task is shoveling sand for them.

recommendations.title: Doomsday Book
recommendations.overview: In 'A Brave New World', a virus brings the city to ruins and zombies flood the streets of Seoul. In 'The Heavenly Creature', a robot reaches enlightenment while working at a temple, but its creators deem this phenomenon a threat to mankind. In the fi
